title: White Chocolate Cheesecake Recipe
summary: A creamy no-bake cheesecake loaded with white chocolate is the ultimate dessert for any occasion. This white chocolate cheesecake is simple to prepare, yet it delivers a sophisticated flavour and texture that will impress everyone. The smooth, velvety filling combines rich cream cheese and melted white chocolate, creating a luscious, indulgent treat. With a buttery graham cracker or digestive biscuit crust, it provides the perfect contrast of flavours and textures. You don’t need to worry about baking; just chill the cheesecake in the fridge for a few hours or overnight to let it set. Garnish it with white chocolate shavings, fresh berries, or a drizzle of raspberry sauce for a pop of colour and extra flavour. Whether you’re hosting a dinner party or craving something sweet, this no-bake white chocolate cheesecake is the perfect dessert choice for any occasion.

ingredients.label: 1 x 250g Pack of Digestive Biscuits (Like McVitie's)
ingredients.name: Digestive Biscuit

method.description: Make the cheesecake base. Crush the biscuits by bashing them in a bag with a rolling pin, being careful to keep the pieces of biscuit reasonable large.
Melt the unsalted butter in a pan then stir in the crushed biscuits until coated all over.
Add the buttery biscuit to a serving dish, pressing it into an even layer.
Now make the cheesecake filling. In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese and crème fraîche together until soft
In a second mixing bowl, semi-whip the double cream.
Melt the white chocolate buttons over a bain-marie until blood temperature (37°C).
Fold the chocolate into the cream cheese mix, then fold in the semi-whipped cream.
Add the cheesecake filling to the biscuit base and top with white chocolate shavings. Then leave to set in the fridge overnight.

chefs.name: Hannah Miller
chefs.summary: Hannah Miller is a multi-talented creator, recipe developer and social media mogul. Hannah played a hand in creating some absolute Mob classics. If you haven't tried it, her French Style Hot Chocolate recipe is a must.
